utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: This one from me .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ahh !

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: It was not on your list , but hopefully you will think it is really fun .

emotion_cause.span: 3_hopefully you will think it is really fun .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: A scooter !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Stick to the list . Always stick to the list .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! No ... no , I love it . Thank you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , open ours next . Open ours next !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Now that you are a couple , we do not get two presents from you guys ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_Now that you are a couple , we do not get two presents from you guys ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: For my last birthday you gave me a hug !

emotion_cause.span: 10_For my last birthday you gave me a hug !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Happy birthday Grandma !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It is better to be over the hill then buried under it .

emotion_cause.span: 13_It is better to be over the hill then buried under it .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All our love Monica and Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: That is funny , yeah !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No ... no ... no ... no ! That was the joke !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , I know ! I get it ! It is funny !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , because you are not a grandmother !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No I know , because to be a grandmother you have to be married and have children and I do not have any of those things .

emotion_cause.span: 19_to be a grandmother you have to be married and have children and I do not have any of those things .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: That is why it is so funny .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All you had to do was buy the card !
